title: Full Body Harness Complete
shortDescription: Polyester full body harness with adjustable chest & leg straps. Includes a Dorsal D-Ring for fall arrest. Ideally placed sit strap for extended comfort
description: Polyester full body harness with adjustable chest & leg straps. Includes a Dorsal D-Ring for fall arrest. Ideally placed sit strap for extended comfort

features: Polyester full body harness with adjustable chest & leg straps
Includes a Dorsal D-Ring for fall arrest
Ideally placed sit strap for extended comfort
Equipped with Lanyard Keepers for placement of free lanyards

Includes shock absorbing double lanyard with steel scaffold hooks 
(DFA-PN361N)

Adjustable 44mm sliding chest strap, shoulder straps, leg straps 
and waist belt
